title: GGCommons Configuration Schema
description: Canonical cross-language JSON Schema for AWS IoT Greengrass GGCommons library configuration. This is the SINGLE SOURCE OF TRUTH for all language libraries (java/python/rust/ts). Do not edit the per-library copies directly — edit this file and run schema/sync-schema.(ps1|sh) to propagate it. CI verifies the copies match (sync-schema --check). NOTE: numeric fields use type 'number' (not 'integer') on purpose — Greengrass delivers config numbers as doubles (e.g. 300.0) and the libraries parse them leniently, so the schema must accept integer-valued floats.

java_format.description: Java log format (Log4j2 PatternLayout), e.g. "%d{yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss} [%-5p] %c{1}: %m%n". Applied only by the Java library; other libraries ignore it. Replaces the former language-agnostic `format`.

python_format.description: Python log format (logging.Formatter), e.g. "%(asctime)s [%(levelname)s] %(name)s: %(message)s". Applied only by the Python library; other libraries ignore it.

rust_format.description: Rust log format using tokens {timestamp} {level} {target} {message}, e.g. "{timestamp} {level} {target}: {message}". Applied only by the Rust library; other libraries ignore it.

ts_format.description: TypeScript log format using tokens {timestamp} {level} {logger} {message}, e.g. "{timestamp} [{level}] {message}". Applied only by the TS library; other libraries ignore it.

filePath.description: Path to log file (supports template variables)

maxFileSize.description: Maximum size before the log file is rotated (e.g. 10MB, 512KB, 1GB)

backupCount.description: Number of rotated backup files to keep

globalControl.description: Enable global logging control for entire application

target.description: Target destination for metrics. 'prometheus' is a pull-based target (in-process registry exposed as OpenMetrics text at an HTTP /metrics endpoint) and is the default on the KUBERNETES platform.

largeFleetWorkaround.description: Enable workaround for large fleet deployments

logFileName.description: Log file path template (for log target)

maxFileSize.description: Maximum log file size (for log target)

destination.description: Messaging destination (for messaging target). 'ipc'/'local' are aliases for the local/IPC transport; 'iotcore'/'iot_core' are aliases for IoT Core.

intervalSecs.description: Emission interval in seconds (for cloudwatch target)

buffer.description: Durable store-and-forward buffer for the cloudwatch target. When type=durable, metrics are appended to an embedded ggstreamlog disk buffer and drained to PutMetricData via a host-callback sink — surviving lengthy cloud disconnects with flat memory and a disk-bounded backlog; datums older than CloudWatch's accept window are dropped on drain. type=memory keeps today's in-memory batching.

type.description: durable = ggstreamlog disk buffer + callback drain; memory = in-memory batching.

path.description: Buffer directory (durable only; supports template variables).

maxDiskBytes.description: Maximum on-disk backlog in bytes (default ~128 MiB).

onFull.description: Behavior when the buffer reaches maxDiskBytes.

fsync.description: Durability flush policy for the disk buffer.

port.description: HTTP port for the prometheus target's /metrics endpoint (prometheus target only).

path.description: HTTP path for the prometheus target's OpenMetrics exposition (prometheus target only).

heartbeat.description: Component heartbeat and health monitoring configuration

measures.description: System metrics to include in heartbeat (availability of individual measures varies by language/platform)

disk.description: Include disk usage metrics (not supported on all platforms/languages)

fds.description: Include file descriptor metrics (not supported on all platforms/languages)

destination.description: Messaging destination (for messaging targets). 'ipc'/'local' are aliases for the local/IPC transport; 'iotcore'/'iot_core' are aliases for IoT Core.

tags.description: Component tags for template variable substitution

global.description: Global configuration applied to all instances

messaging.description: STANDALONE dual-MQTT broker configuration (local broker + optional AWS IoT Core). The same shape is used as the separate messaging-config JSON file passed via `-m STANDALONE <file>`. In GREENGRASS mode messaging uses IPC and this section is typically absent.

local.description: The local MQTT broker connection (required for STANDALONE).

iotCore.description: The optional AWS IoT Core connection (mutual-TLS).

streaming.description: Telemetry streaming configuration (durable/in-memory store-and-forward to Kinesis/Kafka via the shared ggstreamlog core).

streams.description: The set of named streams to open.

credentials.description: Credentials / encrypted local vault configuration (local vault + optional central sync from AWS Secrets Manager).

audit.description: Access-audit logging (on by default; never logs secret values).

parameters.description: Parameters / externalized configuration (offline-first; pluggable source: env, mountedDir, awsSsm).

refreshIntervalSecs.description: Background refresh interval in seconds (0 = no periodic refresh).

bootstrapOnStart.description: Pull the declared sync names/paths into the cache at startup (non-fatal on failure).

health.description: Kubernetes HTTP health/readiness endpoint (on by default on the KUBERNETES platform). Exposes GET /livez (process alive; never checks the broker) and GET /readyz (200 only when messaging is connected and the component is ready; 503 during startup and shutdown), plus an optional GET /startupz.

enabled.description: Enable the HTTP health server. Defaults to true on the KUBERNETES platform, false elsewhere.

port.description: TCP port the health server listens on.

livenessPath.description: Path for the liveness probe (200 while the process is alive; never checks the broker).

readinessPath.description: Path for the readiness probe (200 only when connected and ready; 503 on startup/shutdown).

startupPath.description: Path for the startup probe (reuses readiness semantics; for slow connects).

type.description: Broker type tag (e.g. "mqtt"); set by the Java/Python samples, ignored by Rust/TS.

host.description: Broker host (used by the local broker).

endpoint.description: Broker endpoint FQDN (used by the iotCore broker).

mqttCredentials.description: Broker auth: username/password for the local broker, or certPath/keyPath/caPath for TLS (mutual TLS / IoT Core).

streamSink.description: Export sink — a tagged union on `type` (kinesis | kafka).

streamName.description: Kinesis data stream name (supports template vars).

streamBuffer.description: Embedded buffer. type=disk is durable/file-backed (needs `path`); type=memory is a non-durable RAM ring (no `path`; maxDiskBytes is the byte budget).

keyProvider.description: Envelope-encryption KEK custodian. Tagged by `type`: file (local keyfile), env (base64 KEK from an env var / mounted Secret — the offline-capable software-KEK, default on KUBERNETES), kms/greengrass (AWS KMS via TES), pkcs11 (HSM/TPM). Fields not used by the selected type are ignored.

envVar.description: env: name of the env var holding the base64-encoded 32-byte KEK (default GGCOMMONS_VAULT_KEK).

pinEnv.description: pkcs11: env var holding the PIN (preferred over inline `pin`).

credentialsCentral.description: Optional central sync. type=none (default, local-only) or awsSecretsManager.

sync.description: Selective sync: which secrets this device pulls.

secrets.description: Each entry is a bare name (central id = namespaced path) or {name, from} where `from` is an explicit/shared central id.

paramSource.description: Parameter source. Tagged by `type`: env (prefix), mountedDir (root/securePaths), awsSsm (region/withDecryption/endpointUrl), none. Fields not used by the selected type are ignored.

root.description: mountedDir: root directory of the mounted tree.

securePaths.description: mountedDir: path prefixes whose values are sensitive.

paramCache.description: Offline-first cache. Source-aware persistence by default (remote sources persist encrypted; local sources stay in memory).

paramSync.description: Selective bootstrap/refresh — which parameters to pull.

paths.description: Path prefixes to sync; each entry is a bare string (recursive) or {path, recursive}.
